issue.title: README demo GIF overhaul — truecolor, captions, live GitHub fan-out
issue.description: The README's flagship demo GIF shows a truecolor ACE session in which one alternation-shorthand prompt on the GitHub VCS workflow fans out to three models, actually launches three hermetic agents, and kills them live — with explanatory text overlays produced by new, reusable demo-captioning tooling that all five demo tapes can adopt.

issue.title: Truecolor demo tapes + full artifact regeneration
issue.description: See "Phase `truecolor`": pin COLORTERM/TERM truecolor env in all five VHS tapes (mirroring the visual-snapshot conftest), regenerate demos/out/ with `just demos -y`, and add a saturation sanity guard to the demos pipeline.

issue.title: LLM execution-provider override + fakey demo scenario
issue.description: See "Phase `override`": add a provider-agnostic SASE_LLM_EXEC_PROVIDER env knob at the invoke_agent provider-lookup choke point so launches execute under fakey while displaying the requested provider/model, record the executing provider in run artifacts, audit launch preflights, and add a bundled long-streaming fakey `demo` scenario with tests.

issue.title: Demo media post-processing and caption overlay tooling
issue.description: See "Phase `captions`": implement the research-recommended caption pipeline — per-tape captions.yml sidecars rendered to ASS and burned in with ffmpeg/libass, GIFs derived from the captioned MP4s via palettegen/paletteuse, replace-in-place output policy, Justfile integration, docs, and unit tests.

issue.title: Live GitHub fan-out launch/kill demo + README refresh
issue.description: See "Phase `demo`": provision a demo venv with sase-github, seed a hermetic gh project (acme/nova), rewrite the fanout tape so one alternation-shorthand prompt really launches three fakey-backed agents (CLAUDE/CODEX/AGY badges) that are killed on screen, add the captions sidecar, regenerate all README/blog media, and update README + demos docs.

fields.notes: Implemented reusable demos/scripts/postprocess_demo_media tooling: captions.yml validation, ASS/libass burn-in, measured-fps palette GIFs, atomic replace-in-place outputs, optimized GIF/still derivatives, fontconfig guard, demo Justfile integration, docs, and unit tests. Verification: 12 focused tests pass; real ffmpeg/libass scratch smoke passed with captioned MP4/GIF, optimized GIF, and still; formatting/ruff/mypy/pyscripts/symvision/toobig and committed-plan validation pass. Full suite: 18054 passed, 7 skipped, one load-sensitive residual-freeze soak flaked and passed in isolation. Full just check is otherwise blocked by pre-existing personal generated-skill drift reported by sase validate.
